name: Exfiltration via DNS Tunneling
description: Detects data exfiltration through DNS queries with encoded subdomains
query:
// Detect DNS tunneling exfiltration
// Trigger on high volume of TXT queries with long subdomain labels
events from dns
where query_type = "TXT"
  and query_name matches "^[a-zA-Z0-9+/=]{20,}\."
group by source_ip
having count(*) > 30
within 300 seconds
